summary: SINGLE_FOCUS: 8×8 chessboard grid (alternating GREY_B/GREY_D). ValueTracker k_tr sweeps 0 → 64; always_redraw overlays YELLOW squares on the first k with opacity ∝ log(grain count). Live panel: square index, grains on this square (2^(k-1)), cumulative 2^k - 1 including final 2^64-1 = 18.4 quintillion.
